infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Allow Ark to protect your offline vault with Face ID.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Allow Ark to use motion sensors for compass, level, and survival tools.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Ark to save your position and offline map regions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Ark to record short voice prompts for offline transcription.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Ark to attach spot photos from the camera to saved map locations.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Ark to choose spot photos from your library for saved map locations.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow Ark to protect your offline vault with Face ID.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Ark to record short voice prompts for offline transcription.

plugins.iosMicrophonePermission: Allow Ark to record short voice prompts for offline transcription.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Ark to attach spot photos from the camera to saved map locations.
plugins.photosPermission: Allow Ark to choose spot photos from your library for saved map locations.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Ark to record short voice prompts for offline transcription.

plugins.motionPermission: Allow Ark to use motion sensors for compass, level, and survival tools.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Ark to save your position and offline map regions.

android.extraProguardRules:
# React Native ExecuTorch reaches these Java classes from native JNI code.
# R8 cannot see those references and otherwise removes or renames the runtime.
-keep class org.pytorch.executorch.** { *; }
-keep class com.swmansion.rnexecutorch.** { *; }

# PDFBox can reference the optional Gemalto JPEG2000 decoder when parsing PDFs.
# Ark does not bundle that decoder; OCR/text extraction paths handle failures.
-dontwarn com.gemalto.jp2.JP2Decoder
